name: execute_python
description: Execute arbitrary Python code in a sandboxed environment with timeout enforcement and output capture. Blocks dangerous operations such as os.system, subprocess, and file I/O. Returns stdout, stderr, return code, and execution duration.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time in seconds before the process is killed. Defaults to 30.

allow_network.description: If true, network-related modules (urllib, requests, etc.) are not blocked. Defaults to false.
